===================
===================
=== Dylan I have no one to meet.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan  I have no one to meet
WB 1101/1102


Original silver discs> WAV (EAC) > FLAC (TLH)




Forum, Copenhagen,Denmark, June, 11th 1998
CD 1 Tracks 1-11, CD 2 Tracks 1-6

Bonustracks from

Scandinavium, Goteborg,Sweden, June, 10th 1998
CD 2 Tracks 7-11


From my collection, sorry no further details about taper and recording.
Excellent sound. Artwork included.


CD 1:

All Along The Watchtower
Tonight I'll Be Staying Here With You
Cold Irons Bound
Shooting Star
Silvio
To Ramona
Masters Of War
Love Minus Zero
Tangled Up In Blue
Can't Wait
Make You Feel My Love 


CD 2:

Blind Willie McTell
Highway 61 Revisited
Don't Think Twice
Love Sick
Rainy Day Women #12 & 35
Blowin' in the wind

Bonus Tracks:
To Be Alone With You
Man In The Long Black Coat
Born In Time
The Times
It's All Over Now Baby Blue


Review from Bobboots:

A very good audience recording of a fine show from the 1998 European tour.
There are many fine cd releases from this tour to choose from and this one
stands up nicely along side them. There's some very fine performance throughout 
with a rare outing for Shooting Star and a slowed down re-arrangement 
of 'All Along The watchtower' to open the show. 
The bonus tracks, from the day before, are well chosen and in equally excellent quality. 
The packaging is nothing great, but nice nonetheless.  
===================
===================
===================
